title: Nameshift
description: The nick naming solution brought to you by the Lumina Collection
body:
# Nameshift

**Nameshift** is a versatile Paper plugin that allows players (and admins) to redefine their in-game names with stylized nicknames, offering a fresh layer of personalization for servers. Part of the **Lumina Collection**, Nameshift is designed for role-play use and can work for personal nicknames as well as a team-managed naming tool.

## Features
- Let players choose their name or let them be managed by the team.
- Save presets to quickly switch between different names.

## Installation
Download the latest release from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/nameshift).

## Documentation
For full configuration options and command references, visit the [Nameshift Documentation](https://docs.luminacollection.net/nameshift).

## Support
Need help? Check the official documentation or [open an issue on GitHub]([https://github.com/Lumina-Collection/Nameshift/issues](https://github.com/Lumina-Collection/Nameshift/issues)).
